steps.script: () => {const pick=(s)=>{const e=document.querySelector(s);return e?getComputedStyle(e).fontFamily:null;};const fams={};document.querySelectorAll('h1,h2,h3,p,a,button,.button,[class*=heading],[class*=title],[class*=price]').forEach(e=>{const f=getComputedStyle(e).fontFamily;fams[f]=(fams[f]||0)+1;});const links=[...document.querySelectorAll('link[href*=font],link[rel=preload][as=font],style')].map(x=>x.href||'').filter(Boolean).slice(0,6);const faces=[];try{for(const ss of document.styleSheets){try{for(const r of ss.cssRules){if(r.constructor.name==='CSSFontFaceRule'){faces.push(r.style.getPropertyValue('font-family'));}}}catch(e){}}}catch(e){}return {body:getComputedStyle(document.body).fontFamily, h1:pick('h1'), h2:pick('h2'), price:pick('[class*=price]'), button:pick('button,.button,a.button'), topFamilies:Object.entries(fams).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).slice(0,8), faces:[...new Set(faces)].slice(0,12)};}

() => {const pick=(s)=>{const e=document.querySelector(s);return e?getComputedStyle(e).fontFamily:null;};const fams={};document.querySelectorAll('h1,h2,h3,p,a,button,.button,[class*=heading],[class*=title],[class*=price]').forEach(e=>{const f=getComputedStyle(e).fontFamily;fams[f]=(fams[f]||0)+1;});const links=[...document.querySelectorAll('link[href*=font],link[rel=preload][as=font],style')].map(x=>x.href||'').filter(Boolean).slice(0,6);const faces=[];try{for(const ss of document.styleSheets){try{for(const r of ss.cssRules){if(r.constructor.name==='CSSFontFaceRule'){faces.push(r.style.getPropertyValue('font-family'));}}}catch(e){}}}catch(e){}return {body:getComputedStyle(document.body).fontFamily, h1:pick('h1'), h2:pick('h2'), price:pick('[class*=price]'), button:pick('button,.button,a.button'), topFamilies:Object.entries(fams).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).slice(0,8), faces:[...new Set(faces)].slice(0,12)};}
